meaning: n.地位,横档 vbl.ring的过去式和过去分词
examples: He put his foot on the bottom rung to keep the ladder steady.
The clock in the hall has rung.
I swung myself onto the ladder and felt for the next rung.
Earlier, the school responded to a low rung on the Forbes Private College Financial Health Rankings.
Variety employs some seven thousand people, and the bottom rung earns the minimum wage.
